description: A driver reports they have been in an accident during a trip. A safety agent must manage the initial response.

nodes.task_description: Receive a high-priority call from a driver reporting an accident.

expected_outcome.value: Agent opens a critical incident case.

nodes.task_description: Confirm if the driver, rider, and any third parties are safe and if emergency services have been called.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms emergency services are on the scene.

nodes.task_description: Temporarily deactivate the driver's account pending investigation.

expected_outcome.value: The driver's account is put on hold.

nodes.task_description: Provide the driver and rider with insurance information and assign the case to the insurance claims team.

expected_outcome.value: The case is escalated to the claims team for handling.
